name: small metal room
description: I'm in a small metal room
hints: A small metal room beyond the force field. Part of the alien complex's inner sanctum.
This room is accessed by deactivating the force field in room 29.
Search carefully for items or controls. This is deep in the alien complex.
No standard exits listed. Accessed through force field room (29). Part of endgame sequence.
notes: Small metal room beyond force field. Accessed from room 29 after disabling force field. Part of endgame.
